scripts.sync: VITE_CAPACITOR=true VITE_API_KEY=${API_KEY} npm run build --prefix ../web && npx cap sync android
scripts.run:android: VITE_CAPACITOR=true VITE_API_KEY=${API_KEY} npm run build --prefix ../web && npx cap run android
scripts.build:apk: VITE_CAPACITOR=true VITE_API_KEY=${API_KEY} npm run build --prefix ../web && npx cap sync android && JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk ./android/gradlew -p android assembleDebug
